user.title: Connect to Kukii-Home
user.description: Enter the host and port of your Kukii-Home add-on. Default port is 8765.

zeroconf_confirm.title: Kukii-Home discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Kukii-Home add-on found at {host}:{port}. Add it to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Kukii-Home add-on at the given host:port. Is the add-on running?

abort.already_configured: This Kukii-Home instance is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Discovered Kukii-Home add-on isn't responding on its advertised port. Open the add-on log to investigate.
abort.invalid_discovery_info: Discovery payload from the add-on was malformed.
